languages.original_text: "And you believed him? That xenos couldn't make sense of the workings of my implants, calling them 'primitive' in an attempt to veil his shameful ignorance in insults. How, then, could he possibly understand the highly sophisticated technology that runs through Nuncius? I have dissected xenos like that one, Rogue Trader — their very essence is riddled with lies."

languages.text: "И {d|Encyclopedia:Ch3_TalkWithHaemunculusAboutNuncius}вы ему поверили?{/d} Ксенос не смог разобраться в устройстве моих имплантов, окрестив их "примитивными поделками", пытаясь скрыть позор невежества за оскорблениями. Что уж говорить о невероятно утонченных технологиях, которыми пронизан Нунциус! Я вскрывал, ксеносов подобных ему, Вольный Торговец — само их естество пронизанно ложью".

"And {d|Encyclopedia:Ch3_TalkWithHaemunculusAboutNuncius}you believed him?{/d} That xenos couldn't make sense of the workings of my implants, calling them 'primitive' in an attempt to veil his shameful ignorance in insults. How, then, could he possibly understand the highly sophisticated technology that runs through Nuncius? I have dissected xenos like that one, Rogue Trader — their very essence is riddled with lies."

How, then, could he possibly understand the highly sophisticated technology that runs through Nuncius? I have dissected xenos like that one, Rogue Trader — their very essence is riddled with lies."

languages.text: «¿Y {d|Encyclopedia:Ch3_TalkWithHaemunculusAboutNuncius}le creyó{/d}? Ese xenos no tenía ni la más remota idea sobre el funcionamiento de mis implantes, y los llamó "primitivos" en un intento por ocultar su vergonzosa ignorancia mediante insultos. ¿Cómo podría haber entendido entonces la sofisticadísima tecnología que recorre el cuerpo de Nuncius? He diseccionado a xenos como ese, Comerciante: su misma esencia está plagada de mentiras».
languages.original_text: "And {d|Encyclopedia:Ch3_TalkWithHaemunculusAboutNuncius}you believed him?{/d} That xenos couldn't make sense of the workings of my implants, calling them 'primitive' in an attempt to veil his shameful ignorance in insults. How, then, could he possibly understand the highly sophisticated technology that runs through Nuncius? I have dissected xenos like that one, Rogue Trader — their very essence is riddled with lies."

traits.locale_text: «¿Y {d|Encyclopedia:Ch3_TalkWithHaemunculusAboutNuncius}le creyó{/d}? Ese xenos no tenía ni la más remota idea sobre el funcionamiento de mis implantes, y los llamó "primitivos" en un intento por ocultar su vergonzosa ignorancia mediante insultos. ¿Cómo podría haber entendido entonces la sofisticadísima tecnología que recorre el cuerpo de Nuncius? He diseccionado a xenos como ese, Comerciante: su misma esencia está plagada de mentiras».

languages.text: “而{d|Encyclopedia:Ch3_TalkWithHaemunculusAboutNuncius}您居然相信他{/d}？那个异形连我那些植入物的工作原理都搞不明白，还说它们‘原始落后’，试图用侮辱来掩盖他的可耻与无知。那么，他又怎么可能会理解驱动努恩修斯的精密技术呢？我解剖过他那样的异形，行商浪人——他们的本质中充斥着谎言。”
languages.original_text: "And {d|Encyclopedia:Ch3_TalkWithHaemunculusAboutNuncius}you believed him?{/d} That xenos couldn't make sense of the workings of my implants, calling them 'primitive' in an attempt to veil his shameful ignorance in insults. How, then, could he possibly understand the highly sophisticated technology that runs through Nuncius? I have dissected xenos like that one, Rogue Trader — their very essence is riddled with lies."

traits.locale_text: “而{d|Encyclopedia:Ch3_TalkWithHaemunculusAboutNuncius}您居然相信他{/d}？那个异形连我那些植入物的工作原理都搞不明白，还说它们‘原始落后’，试图用侮辱来掩盖他的可耻与无知。那么，他又怎么可能会理解驱动努恩修斯的精密技术呢？我解剖过他那样的异形，行商浪人——他们的本质中充斥着谎言。”

languages.text: « Et {d|Encyclopedia:Ch3_TalkWithHaemunculusAboutNuncius}vous l'avez cru{/d} ? Ce xénos n'a jamais rien compris à mes implants, il les traitait de "primitifs" pour tenter de masquer son ignorance honteuse derrière des insultes. Comment pourrait-il bien appréhender la technologie de pointe qui anime Nuncius ? J'ai disséqué des xénos comme lui, {mf|libre-marchand|libre-marchande} ; leur essence même est rongée par les mensonges. »
languages.original_text: "And {d|Encyclopedia:Ch3_TalkWithHaemunculusAboutNuncius}you believed him?{/d} That xenos couldn't make sense of the workings of my implants, calling them 'primitive' in an attempt to veil his shameful ignorance in insults. How, then, could he possibly understand the highly sophisticated technology that runs through Nuncius? I have dissected xenos like that one, Rogue Trader — their very essence is riddled with lies."

traits.locale_text: « Et {d|Encyclopedia:Ch3_TalkWithHaemunculusAboutNuncius}vous l'avez cru{/d} ? Ce xénos n'a jamais rien compris à mes implants, il les traitait de "primitifs" pour tenter de masquer son ignorance honteuse derrière des insultes. Comment pourrait-il bien appréhender la technologie de pointe qui anime Nuncius ? J'ai disséqué des xénos comme lui, {mf|libre-marchand|libre-marchande} ; leur essence même est rongée par les mensonges. »

languages.text: "Und {d|Encyclopedia:Ch3_TalkWithHaemunculusAboutNuncius}Ihr glaubt ihm?{/d} Der Xenos verstand die Funktionsweise meiner Implantate nicht und bezeichnete sie als 'primitiv', als er versuchte, seine peinliche Unwissenheit mit Beleidigungen zu kaschieren. Wie hätte er also die hochkomplexe Technologie verstehen sollen, die in Nuncius verbaut ist? Ich habe Xenos wie diesen seziert, {mf|Freihändler|Freihändlerin} ... ihre bloße Essenz strotzt vor Lügen."
languages.original_text: "And {d|Encyclopedia:Ch3_TalkWithHaemunculusAboutNuncius}you believed him?{/d} That xenos couldn't make sense of the workings of my implants, calling them 'primitive' in an attempt to veil his shameful ignorance in insults. How, then, could he possibly understand the highly sophisticated technology that runs through Nuncius? I have dissected xenos like that one, Rogue Trader — their very essence is riddled with lies."

traits.locale_text: "Und {d|Encyclopedia:Ch3_TalkWithHaemunculusAboutNuncius}Ihr glaubt ihm?{/d} Der Xenos verstand die Funktionsweise meiner Implantate nicht und bezeichnete sie als 'primitiv', als er versuchte, seine peinliche Unwissenheit mit Beleidigungen zu kaschieren. Wie hätte er also die hochkomplexe Technologie verstehen sollen, die in Nuncius verbaut ist? Ich habe Xenos wie diesen seziert, {mf|Freihändler|Freihändlerin} ... ihre bloße Essenz strotzt vor Lügen."

languages.text: 「彼を信じたのか？あの異星人は私のインプラントの仕組みを理解できず、恥ずべき無知を侮辱で覆い隠そうとして『原始的な手工業品』と呼んだ。それなら、ヌンシウスを貫く高度に洗練された技術を理解できるわけがない。私はあのような異星人を解剖したことがある。ローグ・トレーダーよ、彼らの本質は嘘に満ちている」。
languages.original_text: "And you believed him? That xenos couldn't make sense of the workings of my implants, calling them 'primitive handicrafts' in an attempt to veil his shameful ignorance in insults. How, then, could he possibly understand the highly sophisticated technology that runs through Nuncius? I have dissected xenos like that one, Rogue Trader — their very essence is riddled with lies."

languages.text: "{d|Encyclopedia:Ch3_TalkWithHaemunculusAboutNuncius}Siz de ona inandınız mı?{/d} O zeno benim implantlarımın işleyişini anlayamadı ve utanç verici cehaletini hakaretlerle örtbas etme çabasıyla onlara 'ilkel' dedi. Hâl böyleyken Nuncius'un içindeki son derece karmaşık teknolojiyi nasıl anlayabilir ki? Onun gibileri teşhis ettim Hür Tacir. Özleri yalanla doludur."
languages.original_text: "And {d|Encyclopedia:Ch3_TalkWithHaemunculusAboutNuncius}you believed him?{/d} That xenos couldn't make sense of the workings of my implants, calling them 'primitive' in an attempt to veil his shameful ignorance in insults. How, then, could he possibly understand the highly sophisticated technology that runs through Nuncius? I have dissected xenos like that one, Rogue Trader — their very essence is riddled with lies."
